unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version (0.4.25) and recommend upgrading to a newer version.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Timestamp Dependence in isSaleFinished()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding highlights the use of block.timestamp for time-based logic, which can be manipulated by miners.
